Home/About
Our Story

Phoenix-grown HVAC craftsmen — three generations strong.

For more than 23 years, Phoenix AC & Heating Experts has connected local homeowners and business owners with the most trusted, factory-trained HVAC technicians in AZ. We're not a national franchise. We're your neighbors — and we've been keeping Phoenix cool one home at a time since 2002.

Who We Are

The Phoenix HVAC team that homeowners refer to their friends

Phoenix AC & Heating Experts started with a simple promise: treat every customer like you'd treat your own family. We've partnered with the same family-owned HVAC business for years — and over that time, we've grown by referral alone. No flashy ads, no high-pressure sales calls. Just honest work, fair prices, and crews who show up when they say they will.

Today, our team's combined experience adds up to more than 100 years on the truck. We've replaced systems in local ranches, installed mini-splits in modern builds, and rescued small business owners from broken server-room AC. There's almost nothing we haven't seen — and that means there's almost nothing we can't fix.

  • Operating across Phoenix and surrounding areas since 2002
  • 100+ years combined HVAC experience
  • A+ rated by the Better Business Bureau
  • Factory-authorized for top-tier brands
  • Background-checked, drug-tested techs
  • Trusted by 15,000+ Phoenix homeowners
Talk to a real person
23+

Years serving Phoenix

Across every major neighborhood in the surrounding county.

What We Stand For

Four values that guide every appointment

When the temperature climbs, you don't have time for runaround. Here's what you can count on every time you call.

Honesty First

If your system can be repaired, we'll repair it — even when a replacement would mean a bigger ticket for us. No upsell theater.

Always On Time

You'll get a real arrival window — not "sometime today." Our techs text when they're 30 minutes out, and arrive in marked, stocked trucks.

Fair, Flat Pricing

Quotes are flat-rate, in writing, before any wrench turns. The price we quote is the price you pay — no creative add-ons after the fact.

Backed in Writing

Every repair includes a labor warranty, every install carries the manufacturer's warranty, and every job is backed by our 100% satisfaction guarantee.

The Standard

Why Phoenix homeowners stick with us for decades

The HVAC industry doesn't have the best reputation. We hear it all the time: "the last guy charged me $1,800 for a capacitor," "they told me I needed a whole new system when only the contactor was bad," "they showed up four hours late and tracked dirt through the house."

We started doing things differently. We hire technicians who care about the craft. We train them on the latest equipment from Trane, Carrier, and American Standard. We pay them salaries — not commissions — so they have zero reason to oversell. And we put every commitment we make in writing.

The result? A 4.9-star average across reviews, an A+ BBB rating since day one, and a customer base that's 96% repeat or referral. We'd love to earn your trust next.

Schedule a service call
4.9

Average Customer Rating

Across Google, BBB, and direct reviews — read by every owner.

Let's Get Started

Talk to a Phoenix HVAC expert today

Whether it's a tune-up before the summer hits or a brand-new high-efficiency system, we'll give you straightforward answers — no pressure, no obligation.

Book a free estimate Call (602) 773-5522
